expected_properties: Outputs update correctly for rapid successive input changes
additional_cases.goal: Validate combinational stability under quick input toggling
notes: No internal storage, outputs should follow inputs without glitches
preconditions: Inputs can be toggled each delta cycle
stimulus_intent: Toggle A and B through a sequence of values without delay
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after each input change, no clock needed

expected_properties: Swapping A and B inverts greater/less outputs while equal remains
additional_cases.goal: Check relational symmetry by swapping operands
notes: A_greater should become A_less and vice versa

expected_properties: Module does not assert or crash on X/Z values
additional_cases.goal: Assess behavior with unknown (X) or high-impedance (Z) inputs
notes: Even though illegal inputs are not defined, ensure safe handling
stimulus_intent: Drive X or Z on A or B
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs after stabilization; outputs may be X

expected_properties: Outputs reflect correct relational result for any 4-bit inputs
Only one of A_greater, A_equal, A_less is high at a time
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Exercise representative legal input combinations and observe output mapping with added emphasis on mutual exclusivity
notes: Preserves ambiguity when timing is unspecified
stimulus_intent: Drive random legal values to A and B
timing_assumptions: No clock required for combinational logic
